powers.name: The Lying Mind
powers.description: Allows the vampire to alter, erase, or rewrite the victim's memories.
powers.roll: Intelligence + Subterfuge + Dominate vs. Resolve + Blood Potency

powers.name: Confidant
powers.description: Draws a subject into the vampire's confidence, making them eager to share secrets and trust the vampire implicitly.

powers.name: Green Eyes
powers.description: Inspires intense jealousy and covetous desire in others towards a target of the vampire's choosing.

powers.name: Idol
powers.description: Inspires cult-like devotion and overwhelming worship from the masses.

powers.name: Mortal Terror
powers.description: Strikes the victim with an overwhelming, irrational fear that forces them to flee in pure panic.

powers.name: Waking Nightmare
powers.description: Forces the victim to experience their worst fears manifested in their waking life.

powers.name: The Grand Delusion
powers.description: Plunges the victim into a persistent, terrifying delusion shaped by the vampire's design.

powers.name: Face in the Crowd
powers.description: Allows the vampire to seamlessly blend into any group or crowd, becoming an indistinguishable part of the background.

powers.name: Beast's Skin
powers.description: Transforms the vampire into a specific predatory animal, such as a wolf or bat.

powers.name: Unnatural Aspect
powers.description: Morphs the vampire's body with terrifying, monstrous physical traits (e.g., membranous wings, hardened skin).

powers.name: Primeval Miasma
powers.description: Allows the vampire to dissipate into an intangible cloud of vapor or merge wholly into the earth.

powers.name: Configure Receiver
powers.description: Allows the vampire to reconfigure a target's connection to the God-Machine or manipulate their Radio Sickness in advanced ways.

powers.name: Broadcast
powers.description: Allows the vampire to transmit the dead signal to multiple targets or over a wide area.

powers.name: Whisper Campaign
powers.description: Sows seeds of doubt and paranoia about the victim among their peers.

powers.name: Friend to Foe
powers.description: Twists a victim's perceptions so they view their friends and loved ones with suspicion and hostility.

name: Crúac (Rites)
source book: Vampire: The Requiem Second Edition / Secrets of the Covenants

powers.name: Pangs of Proserpina
powers.description: A destructive Crúac rite that inflicts deep internal suffering.

powers.name: Rigor Mortis
powers.description: Freezes or paralyzes the victim by seizing their blood.

powers.name: Touch of the Morrigan
powers.description: The ritualist pours the tearing force of his Beast into his hands, inflicting lethal wounds upon striking an opponent.

powers.name: Blood Price
powers.description: A destructive Crúac rite.
powers.roll: Contested by Composure + Blood Potency (Target Successes: 8)

powers.name: Blood Blight
powers.description: A destructive Crúac rite that ruins the purity of blood.

powers.name: Cheval
powers.description: Allows the ritualist to see and hear what the subject does, no matter how far away she is, for the rest of the night.

powers.name: The Hydra's Vitae
powers.description: A destructive Crúac rite that turns blood to venom.

powers.name: Feeding the Crone
powers.description: A Crúac rite honoring the Mother.

powers.name: Deflection of the Wooden Doom
powers.description: A protective rite that shields the vampire from being staked.

powers.name: Willful Vitae
powers.description: A rite that grants independent action or life-like qualities to spilled blood.

powers.name: The Mantle of Amorous Fire
powers.description: The Acolyte dances into an ecstatic Condition, transmuting their form.

powers.name: The Pool of Forbidden Truths
powers.description: The Acolyte spills blood into a vessel and uses a vector for prophecy to divine secrets.

powers.name: Mantle of the Glorious Dervish
powers.description: The Acolyte enters a trance granting a point of armor, increased attack damage, and immunity to being ambushed.

powers.name: Manananggal's Working
powers.description: A Crúac rite to separate or manipulate parts of the body.

powers.name: Gwydion's Curse
powers.description: A curse rite invoking pagan lore.

powers.name: Scapegoat
powers.description: Transfers suffering, banes, or conditions onto a ritual victim.

name: Theban Sorcery (Miracles)
source book: Vampire: The Requiem Second Edition / Secrets of the Covenants

powers.name: Blood Scourge
powers.description: Transforms a portion of the ritualist's blood into a stinging whip weapon (2L) that lasts until the end of the scene or sunrise.

powers.name: Vitae Reliquary
powers.description: Stores or preserves Vitae in an object.
powers.cost: 1 Willpower + Sacrament (any object up to size 3)

powers.name: Curse of Babel
powers.description: Renders the victim unable to speak or write until the next sunrise.
powers.cost: 1 Willpower + Sacrament (an animal or human tongue)

powers.name: Liar's Plague
powers.description: Curses a victim to not tell falsehoods; if he lies, beetles swarm from his mouth.
powers.roll: Contested by Resolve + Blood Potency (Target Successes: 5)

powers.name: Malediction of Despair
powers.description: Curses the victim so the next time he engages in a specific action, he suffers a -5 dice penalty.
powers.roll: Contested by Resolve + Blood Potency (Target Successes: 13)
powers.cost: 1 Willpower + Sacrament (a lock of the victim's hair)

powers.name: Gift of Lazarus
powers.description: A restorative or reanimating Theban miracle.

powers.name: Blandishment of Sin
powers.description: A Theban miracle related to temptation and moral failing.

powers.name: Transubstantiation
powers.description: A Theban miracle that alters the properties of blood or other substances.

powers.name: Apple of Eden
powers.description: Enchants an apple that grants a mortal temporary dots in Intelligence and Wits upon consumption.
powers.cost: 1 Willpower + Sacrament (An apple, a drop of Vitae)

powers.name: Aaron's Rod
powers.description: Enchants a rod or staff so that it can be activated later to become a venomous serpent.

powers.name: The Guiding Star
powers.description: Enchants a star and gold coins; holders of the coin intuitively know the direction to a designated safe haven.
powers.cost: 1 Willpower + Sacrament (Hand-crafted star chart, gold coins)

powers.name: Curse of Isolation
powers.description: Severs the bonds between a subject and a vampire, making the mortal subject the ritualist's Touchstone instead.
powers.roll: Contested by Resolve + Blood Potency (Target Successes: 15)

powers.name: Orison of Voices
powers.description: Allows the ritualist to hear whenever any voice in the world speaks her name, along with context, for three nights.

powers.name: Sins of the Ancestors
powers.description: A punitive Theban miracle targeting the lineages of Kindred or mortals.

powers.name: Miracle of the Dead Sun
powers.description: A Theban miracle allowing limited resistance or interaction with the day.

name: Scales of the Dragon
source book: Vampire: The Requiem Second Edition / Night Horrors / Thousand Years of Night

powers.name: Day-Wake Conditioning
powers.description: Reverses the subject's sleep cycle, causing them to wake at dawn and slumber at night in a brightly lit chamber.

powers.name: Epidermal Shielding Bath
powers.description: Submerges a Kindred subject in an alchemical bath of blood and fat to shield them from the sun/fire.

powers.name: Augmented Vitae Draught
powers.description: Drains the Dragon's Vitae into a container that augments the physical attributes of anyone who drinks it.

powers.name: Kindred Sense Endowment
powers.description: Sickens the subject but grants the ability to see and smell blood as though they were a vampire.

powers.name: Surgical Heart Removal
powers.description: Surgically removes a Kindred subject's heart to prevent staking and alter the Beast's connection.

powers.name: Stage-One Blood Cleansing Ritual
powers.description: Develops blood sympathy towards those the Dragon has blood bound by washing them in a mixture of Vitae and animal viscera.

powers.name: Codependency
powers.description: Buries ghouls to seed Vitae into the earth, altering the domain's personality to reflect the master's will.
powers.cost: Full Vitae pool, sacrifice of multiple ghouls

powers.name: Cold of the Grave
powers.description: Extinguishes a central pyre with a mixture of Vitae and corpse dust to grant the effects of Smother to all vampires in the domain.

powers.name: Psychic Lobotomy
powers.description: Removes a part of the subject's brain to protect him from supernatural mental influence at the cost of an Attribute dot.

powers.name: Grafting Unholy Flesh
powers.description: Alters the flesh of a subject; must be performed within a Wyrm's Nest.

powers.name: Fealty's Reward
powers.description: Manipulates the blood bond to reward a thrall or alter the terms of servitude.

powers.name: Mass Embrace
powers.description: An experimental procedure used to efficiently Embrace or augment multiple subjects simultaneously.

powers.name: Spirit Tether
powers.description: Ingesting a hallucinogenic Vitae mixture allows the vampire to lay their body to rest while projecting their mind (functions as Twilight Projection).

powers.name: Psychic Leech
powers.description: A Scale that allows the Dragon to siphon mental energy or secrets from a subject.

powers.name: Beseech the Sleeping
powers.description: A Scale used to communicate with or influence slumbering/torpid entities.

powers.name: Command the Mind
powers.description: A Scale that exercises direct control over a subject's thoughts or actions.

powers.name: Sanguinary Invigoration
powers.description: Empowers the physical or supernatural attributes of the subject using specialized blood alchemy.

powers.name: Drain Understanding
powers.description: Steals knowledge and experience from a victim, lowering a random Skill dot from the victim and transferring it to the necromancer.
powers.roll: Resolve + Occult + Kindred Necromancy vs. Resolve + Blood Potency (Target Successes: 8)

powers.name: Quicken Corpse
powers.description: Imbues a humanoid corpse with necromantic power, animating it and creating a mindless but obedient zombie follower.
powers.cost: 1 Vitae + Material Focus (An intact humanoid corpse)

powers.name: Corpse Preservation
powers.description: Preserves a dead body from decay and rot.

powers.name: Eyes of the Deceased
powers.description: Allows the necromancer to see through a corpse's eyes or view its final moments.

powers.name: Flesh-Born Servitor
powers.description: Constructs and animates a specialized servitor out of flesh and bone.

powers.name: Infuse Undead
powers.description: Grants heightened power or specific instructions to a reanimated entity.

powers.name: Soul Jar
powers.description: Traps a ghost or soul within a prepared receptacle.

powers.name: Open Avernian Gateway
powers.description: Forces open a gateway to the Underworld.

powers.name: Destroy Avernian Gateway
powers.description: Seals and destroys an existing gateway to the Underworld.

powers.name: Create Avernian Gateway
powers.description: Rips a brand new, permanent gateway into the Underworld.

powers.name: Spiritual Sight
powers.description: Attunes the necromancer's vision to perceive ghosts and Twilight entities.

powers.name: Return to the Dust
powers.description: Banishes a ghost or forcefully destroys an undead construct.

powers.name: Appraise the Dead
powers.description: A clinical appraisal ritual to understand the cause of death or residual energies of a corpse.

powers.name: Corpse Repair
powers.description: Knits together the flesh of a ruined corpse to make it presentable or functional.

powers.name: Corrosive Touch
powers.description: Channels necrotic energy to rot flesh or break down physical matter with a touch.

powers.name: Lair of the Beast
powers.description: Extends the vampire's Predatory Aura over the marked territory, allowing her to feel trespassing predators and lash out at them from a distance.

powers.name: Territory's Wisdom
powers.description: The vampire feeds on an employee of a business in her territory, gaining a sympathetic link allowing her to spend Vitae on an appropriate Skill.

powers.name: Prince's Wrath
powers.description: A devastating territorial ritual requiring the Család to stab her shadow and bleed her power directly onto the ground.
powers.cost: 1 Vitae per dot + (5 - Blood Potency) lethal damage

powers.name: Nowhere to Run
powers.description: For the rest of the night, all Stealth actions made in the territory automatically fail, and Obfuscate provokes a Clash of Wills.

powers.name: Taste the Land
powers.description: A ritual that connects the Család to the history and happenings of the territory.

powers.name: Territory's Mark
powers.description: A ritual to cement a domain's boundaries or impose the vampire's presence over the area.

powers.name: Urban Unrest
powers.description: Agitates the population or environment within the territory to cause disruption and chaos.

powers.name: Dragon's Own Fire
powers.description: Makes the blood running through her dead veins acidic, causing unarmed attacks to deal lethal damage.

powers.name: Taste of the Dragon
powers.description: Mixes blood with toxic reagents to create a poison that deals lethal damage nightly and mystically binds the victim for tracking.

powers.name: Pasha's Vision
powers.description: Anoints her brow with blood to see an aura around the eyes of everyone she meets, showing their intents.

powers.name: Kale-Koh
powers.description: An explosive alchemy designed to rend fortifications and smash physical barriers.

powers.name: Spider's Hijra
powers.description: A Kimiya formula involving Creation themes.

powers.name: Sayih's Kohl
powers.description: A Kimiya formula involving Transmutation themes.

powers.name: al-Ajsad
powers.description: A Kimiya formula involving Creation themes.

powers.name: Ebony Horse
powers.description: A Kimiya formula involving Transmutation themes.

powers.name: Intikam
powers.description: A Kimiya formula involving both Destruction and Transmutation themes.
powers.roll: Wits + Occult + Destruction / Intelligence + Academics + Transmutation

powers.name: Burn the Dragon's Blood
powers.description: A devastating Kimiya formula focused purely on Destruction themes.

powers.name: Curse of the Monkey Prince
powers.description: A Kimiya formula involving Transmutation themes.

powers.name: Animal Magnetism
powers.description: The Brood may add her level of Triadic Evolution to any mundane Expression, Persuasion, or Socialize challenge for one hour.

powers.name: Don't Look It in the Eye
powers.description: The Claimed may add his level of Triadic Evolution to any mundane Animal Ken, Intimidation, or Streetwise challenge for one hour.

powers.name: Merely a Flesh Wound
powers.description: A manifestation that allows the Brood to shrug off damage or ignore severe wounds temporarily.

powers.name: Sprint
powers.description: The vampire may add his level of Triadic Evolution to his running speed or non-combative Athletics maneuvers for one hour.

powers.name: Acidic Blood
powers.description: Transforms blood into acid; vampires/Strix suffer 1 lethal per Vitae and gain no nourishment, mortals suffer 2 lethal damage.

powers.name: Fight or Flight
powers.description: For the next hour, the Claimed cannot be surprised.

powers.name: Perfect Ambush
powers.description: The Claimed may add her level of Triadic Evolution to their Dexterity + Stealth rolls for determining surprise for one hour.

powers.name: Trophy
powers.description: Allows the Brood to preserve any Size 1 body part from a Kindred for a number of years equal to his level of Triadic Evolution.

powers.name: Instinctual Conversation
powers.description: Engage in line of sight telepathic communication via images with anyone who currently has a Bestial Condition.

powers.name: Riding the Man
powers.description: The character may add his level of Triadic Evolution to any one Intelligence or Wits roll for one hour.
